payload.compiled_summary: PETSc: review Probe PETSc through artifact://environment-spec/eng_petsc_family_docker, Confirm the current Phase 2 gate state for PETSc. Checklist PETSc pack links to the intended environment spec(s), PETSc adapter and evidence bundle reference the same runtime verification report, PETSc anti-patterns and failure signatures match the module class and runtime path.
